corresponding PLAN_ID_07) to the CONTRACT_ID_08 (and PLAN_ID_08). 

Prior to 2015, this variable was always encrypted to comply with CMS privacy rules. You need to know 
both the Part D contract number and plan benefit package identification number (variable called 
PLAN_ID_YY) in order to identify the specific plan benefit package offered to beneficiaries for the 
particular year (YY).
